title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

### Rele

title: Fix File Editing Tool Reliability - replace_in_file, write_to_file, and Diff Failures
summary:
## Problem

Cline's file editing tools (replace_in_file and write_to_file) suffer from widespread reliability issues that significantly impact user productivity and increase API costs. These failures affect users across all models (Claude 3.7/4, Gemini, GPT, local models) and cause frustrating infin

title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] Add streaming aggregation mode to avoid intra-batch issues
summary:
## Why
Batch decisions can produce intra-batch confusion (especially ADD target/index mixups).

This PR moves aggregation to a lean streaming mode (1 item per LLM call), improves parser robustness, adds provider/timeout controls, and documents benchmark traces.
